# StarOff

## Tags
dislike, unlike, remove, unrate

## Categories
multimedia, social

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/star-off)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::StarOff;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        StarOff { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
